g.text: NAS-01 RAID array degraded — disk 3 showing SMART warnings.
Switch port Gi0/4 flapping — 12 transitions in the last hour.
TLS cert on proxy-01 expires in 9 days. Renewal requires approval.
3 Docker containers on docker-host-02 have newer images available.
Backup verification passed for all 8 backup targets.
Why was the file server slow last night?
Disk I/O on nas-01 was saturated between 2:00–4:30 AM
during backup verification on /vol/share. Average write
window to 1:00 AM would avoid the overlap.
